name: Integer Holdings Corp
business: Integer Holdings Corporation is one of the world's largest medical device contract development and manufacturing organizations (CDMOs), serving the Cardio and Vascular, Neuromodulation, and Cardiac Rhythm Management markets. It provides components, subassemblies, and finished devices to large, multi-national original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and their affiliated subsidiaries.
sellsTo: Other Markets (minimally invasive surgery, general surgery, orthopedics, portable medical)

exposures.sentence: Integer Holdings Corporation, headquartered in Plano, Texas, is one of the world s largest medical device contract development and manufacturing organizations ( CDMOs ), serving the Cardio and Vascular, Neuromodulation, and Cardiac Rhythm Management markets.

Key products and capabilities span a full suite of devices including coronary stents, balloon catheters, atherectomy devices, imaging and sensing devices, chronic total occlusion solutions, percutaneous transluminal coronary angioplasty and access guidewires, introducer sheaths, and vascular closure devices.

catalysts.sentence: On December 4, 2025, we acquired certain assets of Biocoat Incorporated ( Biocoat ).
On February 28, 2025, we acquired substantially all of the assets and assumed certain liabilities of Vertical Solutions, Inc., d/b/a VSi Parylene ( VSi ).

On January 7, 2025, we acquired substantially all of the assets and assumed certain liabilities of certain subsidiaries of Katahdin Industries, Inc., including its main operating subsidiary, Precision Coating LLC
We currently expect Portable Medical sales to wind down with the final sales and market exit occurring in 2026.

Subsequent to December 31, 2025, we entered into an accelerated share repurchase agreement on February 19, 2026 to repurchase approximately $50.0 million of common stock under the Share Repurchase Program.
